Document List Display Test

This document is uploaded specifically to test whether uploaded documents appear correctly in the document list interface.

Verification Points:
1. Document name appears in list
2. File size is displayed
3. Upload date is shown
4. Document status is indicated
5. Document can be selected/clicked

Document Metadata:
- Name: test-list-document.txt
- Type: Text Document
- Category: Test Files
- Access Level: Standard

Content for AI Analysis:
Project Name: Document List UI Testing
Objective: Verify document list functionality
Success Criteria:
- Document appears in list after upload
- Metadata is accurately displayed
- Document is accessible for selection

This file validates the document management interface.
